expectations.text: all three phases documented with evidence

expectations.evidence: wt window found via WindowsTerminal PID 2124, title HerdrPlus[default], visible:true, then IsZoomed:true with full-desktop rect after ShowWindow fixup; script's FindWindowW-by-title false-failed (defect noted and since fixed)

expectations.text: server still running after window close
expectations.evidence: WM_CLOSE to hwnd 266894; client exited, server PID 24208 stayed alive and answered status --json running:true
herdr-cleanup.ps1 dry-run then real: default session stopped, 18.5MB freed, force_killed []; postcheck.json herdr_process_count=0, herdrplus_windows=0

expectations.text: did not block on interactive TUI
expectations.evidence: TUI ran in separate wt window; agent shell never attached
